commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And I will make your tongue cleave to the roof of your mouth, that you shall be dumb, and shall not be to them one who reproves: for they are a rebellious house. "When there is a multitude of sins, (or sinners; peccatorum) the offenders are unworthy of being corrected by the Lord. Jerome) The prophet's silence might suffice to admonish them. (Calmet) He heard the Lord's commands to chap. , before he spoke to the people. (Menochius).
